title: Third-Party Repository or Package Reference Exposed
description: Externally reachable content referenced public third-party repositories or package sources that may leak implementation detail or assist reconnaissance.
impact: Public repository and package references can reveal technology choices, internal naming, release patterns, or related assets useful to attackers.
likelihood: Low to Medium because impact depends on what the referenced resources expose.
recommendations: Review whether referenced repositories, packages, or images expose unnecessary implementation detail.
Confirm that linked repositories and package sources are intended to be public.
Reduce unnecessary public references that reveal internal structure or operational dependencies.
